summary: Iteration 76 - Real-Time Analytics Full Feature Testing Complete. All 6 features verified: 1) Production monitoring with DB/API/WebSocket status and CPU/Memory metrics, 2) Email alerts with test functionality and alert history, 3) WebSocket-based updates (falls back to polling when connection fails), 4) CSV/PDF exports working for overview/generations/revenue/users, 5) Custom date range filters (1d/7d/30d/90d/custom), 6) Granular revenue breakdowns with byPlan/dailyTrend/topUsers. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All tabs and features verified.

minor.issue: WebSocket connections are unstable - connections close quickly and reconnect repeatedly. However, the polling fallback works correctly so functionality is not impacted.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All 6 Real-Time Analytics features implemented and working
✅ CSV Export: 4 data types (overview, generations, revenue, users) - all working
✅ PDF Export: Analytics report generation working correctly with fpdf library
✅ Monitoring Health: Returns DB/API/WebSocket status + CPU/Memory metrics
✅ Alert System: Config, history, and test alert endpoints working
✅ Revenue Breakdown: Returns byPlan, dailyTrend, byPaymentMethod, topUsers, summary
✅ Admin Access Control: All endpoints properly restricted to ADMIN role
✅ Non-admin users receive 403 Forbidden for all analytics endpoints
⚠️ WebSocket unstable but falls back to polling automatically
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing admin and demo users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-Time Analytics 6 features fully tested. All APIs working. WebSocket has reconnection issues but polling fallback works. Admin access required for all endpoints. Export CSV/PDF, monitoring health, alerts, date filters, revenue breakdown - all verified.

feature_1_production_monitoring.returns: System status (healthy/degraded), DB/API/WebSocket component status, Error rate, Jobs count, CPU%, Memory%

endpoints: /api/realtime-analytics/alerts/config - Returns thresholds and email configured status
feature_2_email_alerts.note: Email alerts require SendGrid API key - configured in this environment

feature_3_websocket_updates.note: WebSocket connections are unstable but frontend falls back to 30-second polling automatically

feature_6_revenue_breakdown.returns: byPlan (plan revenue breakdown), dailyTrend (daily revenue), byPaymentMethod, topUsers (top 10 spenders), summary (total/avg)

frontend_tabs_verified.overview_tab: Active Users (LIVE), Total Users, Generations Today, Logins Today, Credits Used, Revenue Today, Success Rate chart, Weekly Revenue, Generations by Type, Hourly Activity chart, Recent Activity feed, Generation Trend with 7/14/30 day selector
frontend_tabs_verified.revenue_tab: Total Revenue (INR), Total Transactions, Avg Transaction, Revenue by Plan breakdown, Daily Revenue Trend chart, Top Spending Users list
frontend_tabs_verified.monitoring_tab: System Status (healthy/degraded), Database/API/WebSocket component status, Performance Metrics (Error Rate, Total Jobs, Failed Jobs, Recent Activity), System Resources (CPU%, Memory%)
frontend_tabs_verified.alerts_tab: Alert Configuration, Send Test Alert button, Email alerts configured indicator, Alert Thresholds display, Recent Alerts list
frontend_tabs_verified.export_tab: CSV Exports (Overview Data, Generation History, Revenue & Payments, User Data), PDF Report download
